title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Exide Industries Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Exide Industries Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Exide Industries Digital Technologies:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
